zh.Drayton, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Basset於大約1285年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，他的父親Sir Ralph V Bassett MP42歲，母親Hawise de Gray32歲。他於1304年與Joan de Beaumont在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年2月25日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Basset于大约1285年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特时，他的父亲Sir Ralph V Bassett MP42岁，母亲Hawise de Gray32岁。他于1304年与Joan de Beaumont在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年2月25日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾可利其德雷頓。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Basset was born about 1285, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ralph V Bassett MP, was 42 and his mother, Hawise de Gray, was 32. He married Joan de Beaumont in 1304, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 February 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Basset est né environ 1285, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph V Bassett MP, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Gray, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Beaumont en 1304, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 février 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Basset um 1285 in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph V Bassett MP 42 und seine Mutter Hawise de Gray 32. Er hat 1304 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Februar 1343 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset è nato il circa 1285 nel Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ralph V Bassett MP, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Gray, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Beaumont nel 1304, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 febbraio 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bassetが約1285年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph V Bassett MPは42歳，母Hawise de Grayは32歳であった。1304年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJoan de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年2月25日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアペンクリッジドレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Basset(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph V Bassett MP(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Gray(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Joan de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 2월 25일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 펜크리지 드라이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ralph V Bassett MP, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Gray, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Beaumont em 1304, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de fevereiro de 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Basset родился около 1285 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph V Bassett MP было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Gray, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Beaumont в 1304 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 февраля 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности дреитон, пенкридж, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Basset nació aproximadamente 1285, en Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Ralph V Bassett MP, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Hawise de Gray, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan de Beaumont en 1304, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de febrero de 1343, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Drayton, Penkridge, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
